title: 7-Day Halal Diet Plan
content: {"title":"7-Day Halal Diet Plan","days":[{"day":"Monday","summary":{"calories":1800,"protein":"90g","carbs":"200g","fat":"60g"},"meals":[{"type":"Breakfast","items":[{"name":"1 cup Oatmeal with 1 tbsp Honey & Almonds","calories":350,"protein":"18g","carbs":"35g","fat":"11g"}]},{"type":"Lunch","items":[{"name":"150g Grilled Chicken with 1 cup Brown Rice","calories":500,"protein":"25g","carbs":"50g","fat":"15g"}]},{"type":"Dinner","items":[{"name":"1 piece Baked Salmon with Steamed Broccoli","calories":650,"protein":"33g","carbs":"65g","fat":"20g"}]},{"type":"Snacks","items":[{"name":"1 medium Apple with 2 tbsp Peanut Butter","calories":300,"protein":"15g","carbs":"30g","fat":"9g"}]}]},{"day":"Tuesday","summary":{"calories":1800,"protein":"90g","carbs":"200g","fat":"60g"},"meals":[{"type":"Breakfast","items":[{"name":"2 Scrambled Eggs with 2 slices Whole Wheat Toast","calories":350,"protein":"18g","carbs":"35g","fat":"11g"}]},{"type":"Lunch","items":[{"name":"1 bowl Beef Stew with Mixed Veggies","calories":500,"protein":"25g","carbs":"50g","fat":"15g"}]},{"type":"Dinner","items":[{"name":"1 bowl Lentil Soup with Side Salad","calories":650,"protein":"33g","carbs":"65g","fat":"20g"}]},{"type":"Snacks","items":[{"name":"1 handful Mixed Nuts & 1 banana","calories":300,"protein":"15g","carbs":"30g","fat":"9g"}]}]}]}
